% fig_lec10_curve_chart.tex — Curve C on M and its chart-image curve in R²
% Data: generated by scripts/sim_lec09_lec10.jl
%
% Same curve as fig_lec10_curve_tangent, viewed simultaneously on M and in
% the chart α : M ⊃ O_α → U_α ⊂ R².  The chart map ψ in this example is
% vertical projection (x,y,z) ↦ (x,y), so the chart-image curve is just
% c(t) = (-2 + 4t, -1 + 1.6·sin(2.5·t)).

\begin{center}
\begin{tikzpicture}
  % ── LEFT: curve on M ────────────────────────────────────────
  \begin{axis}[
      name=M,
      width=7.4cm, height=5.4cm,
      view={-32}{34},
      xmin=-3, xmax=3, ymin=-3, ymax=3, zmin=-1.1, zmax=1.1,
      axis lines=none, xtick=\empty, ytick=\empty, ztick=\empty, clip=false,
  ]
    \addplot3[surf, opacity=0.30, shader=interp,
              colormap name=grsurface, mesh/rows=55, forget plot]
      table {data/lec07_surface.dat};

    \addplot3[munsell, line width=1.3pt, no markers, forget plot]
      table {data/lec10_curve_M.dat};

    \addplot3[only marks, mark=*, mark size=1.7pt, banana!90!black, forget plot]
      table {data/lec10_curve_endpoints_M.dat};

    \node[font=\sf\small, text=spacecadet]
      at (axis cs:-2.4,-2.8,1.0) {$\M$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!60!black, anchor=north east]
      at (axis cs:-2.05,-1.05,-0.05) {$p$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!60!black, anchor=north west]
      at (axis cs:2.05,-0.04,0.30) {$q$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=munsell, anchor=south east]
      at (axis cs:-1.20,-0.20,0.35) {$C$};
  \end{axis}

  % ── RIGHT: chart image of the curve in R² ──────────────────
  \begin{axis}[
      name=chart,
      at={($(M.east)+(2.0cm,0)$)}, anchor=west,
      width=4.6cm, height=4.6cm,
      axis equal image,
      axis lines=middle,
      axis line style={birrenorange, line width=0.6pt,
                       -{Stealth[length=5pt,width=3pt]}},
      xmin=-3.0, xmax=3.0, ymin=-2.0, ymax=2.0,
      xtick=\empty, ytick=\empty, clip=false,
  ]
    \addplot[munsell, line width=1.2pt, no markers, forget plot]
      table {data/lec10_curve_chart.dat};

    \addplot[only marks, mark=*, mark size=1.6pt, banana!90!black, forget plot]
      table {data/lec10_curve_endpoints_chart.dat};

    \node[font=\sf\small, text=birrenorange]
      at (axis cs:2.85,1.75) {$\Rn{n}$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!60!black, anchor=north east]
      at (axis cs:-2.0,-1.0) {$\psi(p)$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!60!black, anchor=west]
      at (axis cs:2.05,-0.04) {$\psi(q)$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=munsell, anchor=south]
      at (axis cs:0.30,0.85) {$\psi\!\circ\! C$};
  \end{axis}

  % ── ψ arrow ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  \draw[thick, -{Stealth[length=7pt,width=4pt]}, spacecadet]
    ($(M.east)+(0.05,0.1)$) -- ($(chart.west)+(-0.05,0.1)$)
    node[midway, above, font=\small, text=spacecadet]{$\psi$};
\end{tikzpicture}
\end{center}
